title: stachys elliptica
intro: Stachys elliptica, also known as the Narrowleaf Betony, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family Lamiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Stachys elliptica include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and relieving headaches and muscle pain. Stachys elliptica can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
